---
title: "CV"
---

[Download CV (PDF)](cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

---

## Education

**Ph.D. in Environmental Politics** (2022–Present)<br>
ETH Zürich · Supervisor: Thomas Bernauer<br>
*Visiting stay, Universitat Pompeu Fabra, Barcelona (2026)*

**M.A. in Political Science** (2020–2021)<br>
University of Konstanz

**M.Sc. in Development Studies** (2019–2020)<br>
London School of Economics and Political Science

**B.A. in Political Science** (2015–2019)<br>
University of Konstanz

---

## Positions

**Project Manager**, Swiss Environmental Panel, Zürich (2022–Present)

**Carlo Schmid Fellow**, Natural Resources for Development Unit, OECD, Paris (2021–2022)

---

## Scholarships & Grants

- Full Study Scholarship, German Academic Scholarship Foundation (Studienstiftung des deutschen Volkes), 2015–2021
- Carlo Schmid Fellowship, German Academic Exchange Service (DAAD), 2021–2022

---

## Teaching

**ETH Zürich**, Department of Humanities, Social and Political Sciences

- Co-Instructor, *Introduction to Political Science* (Autumn Semesters 2023 & 2024)
- Co-Instructor, *Methods I: Research Design* (Autumn Semester 2022)
- Co-Instructor, *Methods II: Quantitative and Qualitative Methods for the Social Sciences* (Spring Semester 2023)

---

## Skills

**Methods:** Survey design, experimental design, quasi-experimental methods

**Software:** R, Markdown, Stata, LaTeX, Git

**Languages:** German (fluent), English (fluent), French (fluent), Catalan (basic)
